title: Golem Spawn Animation
description: An animation that plays when an Iron Golem or Snow Golem is spawning
body: This mod adds an animation to Golem Altars (both Snow Golems and Iron Golems) just after they've been built, to replace the regular boring instant spawn. **Compatible with [Golem Spawn Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/golem-spawn-fix)!** **[Excalibur resource pack compatibility](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal-withergolem-spawn-animation)! (by Ruseki)** **Also try [Wither Spawn Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/wither-spawn-animation)!** [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/golem-spawn-animation)
